top_signals.title: E.l.f. Beauty to walk back some tariff price increases amid high gas prices and consumer 'suffering'
top_signals.summary: E.l.f. Beauty raised prices by $1 last August to offset the impact of tariffs. It's now planning to walk back some of that amid a consumer pullback.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
